message:
feat(daemon): wire real-time components for dashboard

Integrate log streaming, metrics polling, and status broadcasting into
the daemon to enable live dashboard updates. When the HTTP server is
enabled, the daemon now wires up:

- StatusBroadcaster: connected to state change callbacks for real-time
  status updates via WebSocket
- LogTailer: starts/stops tailing VM stdout/stderr when tasks are
  created or stopped
- MetricsPoller: polls VM metrics every 5 seconds and broadcasts to
  subscribed clients

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
